entry.title: Re: 銀行媒體檔(Map Format Data)格式，明細行流水號設置
entry.content: dear colleagues, you might want to consider use 'Variables' to add this exra information. In the Variables section, you create variables to store the results of simple mathematical operations.' https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/656a410b5ce14bcd82d40b88f26d8d74/e5361718d78c40bca9a36aaa74022104.html best regards, liling

entry.title: Re: 銀行媒體檔(Map Format Data)格式，明細行流水號設置
entry.content: Hi Liling, Thanks for the suggestion! Would you mind sharing the steps you took to set it up? We'd love to follow your approach to improve our own setup.

entry.title: CVE-2025-27428に関して不明点があります
entry.content:
ご担当者様

お世話になっております。

題記の件、お客様のERPおよびSolmanシステムは本件の脆弱性に関連しています。
ノート 3581811 を確認しましたが、下記の不明な点についてご教授頂けますでしょうか？

１．ERPもST-PIが実装しているため、ノート3581811  を適用する必要がある認識で宜しいでしょうか？

２．RFC対応の汎用モジュールに関連しているため、ノートhttps://me.sap.com/notes/3581811の適用は、業務にどんな影響を与えるでしょうか？

以上、宜しくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CVE-2025-27428に関して不明点があります
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。
頂いたご質問を下記回答させていただきます。

１．ERPもST-PIが実装しているため、ノート 3581811 を適用する必要がある認識で宜しいでしょうか？
＝＞はい、ご認識の通りです。
２．RFC対応の汎用モジュールに関連しているため、ノート3581811 の適用は、業務にどんな影響を与えるでしょうか？
＝＞業務に影響しません。

以上、ご確認のほどよろしくお願いいたします。
SAPサポート

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management across SAP and Google
entry.content: Hi - Thanks for the insightful post , would like to receive some advices on if the same concept is applicable for users sitting within China. Customer is having concern on the China firewall might impact on the operability google related product including G suite.

entry.title: Re: Part 5: Use SAP Graph with your own data
entry.content: get it~ danke schoen Marc.

entry.title: Map Format Data for Payments 中文字元長度設置問題
entry.content:
我們在設置銀行媒體檔的時候遇到一個問題，一般產出檔案時，不管中英文字元都是1長度，
由於銀行檔案規格是一個中文字元占用2長度，請問我要如何設定才能將中文字設定一個中文字為2長度，

若沒有這樣設置，對銀行來說檔案格式就是錯誤的！
已經有嘗試使用"Enable Length in Bytes "，但是沒有效果，還請各位專家解答！

entry.title: Re: Price Settings in CPQ – BRIM S/4 Solution Quotation Integration
entry.content:
Hi @MohanrajC ,

Kindly check if you are using condition type specific to discount and that it is mapped in the CPQ pricing procedure to appropriate discount columns.

If issue persists , kindly raise SAP incident to contact SAP support.

Thanks,

Best Regards,

Urmil

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a warehouse order even when...
entry.content:
Hi @cheng_zhou 

"ven if there is no inventory, a virtual location can be used as a placeholder." -> Create or existing Storage type settings of Negative Stock...Please see the two options and use as per your need.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: A bug of filter in fact data preview?
entry.content:
Hi Expert, I'm working in Datasphere to process remote table data.
Last week I triggered the HANA database upgrade to Database Release 4.00.000.00.1747122077 (2025.2.14) and Patch Release 2025.2.14. Then I found the filter function doesn't work when previewing data in a not persisted fact view. I can input filter conditions but system not response when click the 'OK' button. While the filter works well in a persisted fact view.
Is it a bug? Anyone find the same problem? It is permitted to preview all data lines but can't filter to less data lines, absolutely it is not related to the performance concerns.
This bug caused a significant decrease in efficiency. When I make some changes in a exist Fact view and there are dozen steps of data process, I can't see the specific data line result, I have to cut off the steps and save as a new fact view and persist it, then use filter to debug.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a warehouse order even when...
entry.content: Yes, you can allow negative available stock for the storage type (customizing). In this case you can create warehouse task.

entry.title: Re: Business Partner(BP) Complete Configuration Guide in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content: Nice and very informative .

entry.title: Nota SAP disponível para Nota Técnica 2025.002
entry.content:
A SAP liberou, em 09/05/25, a Note 3600961, com uma adaptação para os novos requisitos fiscais da Nota Técnica 2025.002.

Agora, o sistema estará preparado para processar os impostos CBS e IBS com alíquota zero.


SAP NOTE: 3600961 - Tax Reform: Impostos CBS e IBS na NF com taxa zero.

entry.title: Re: Supplier determination for inbound deliveries from pr...
entry.content: I would suggest you to check t001w table, if supplier assigned to the plant

entry.title: Re: Price Settings in CPQ – BRIM S/4 Solution Quotation Integration
entry.content:
Hi @MohanrajC 

you can refer the below Blog as reference of mapping all CPS Conditions to CPQ and back to S/4 using Pricing Procedures
https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blog-posts-by-sap/mapping-pricing-conditions-from-sap-cps-to-sap-cpq-and-back-to-s-4hana/ba-p/14100608

@Urmil_Apte

entry.title: Re: How to identify Login user as Manager in Add new Empl...
entry.content: MRUTYUNJAY Unfortunately i dont have any field "is manager" in Position . Any other alternate solution u have?

entry.title: Re: Pricing error: Mandatory condition UTXJ is missing
entry.content:
First of all check in your document you are creating (Quotation / Sales Order) which pricing procedure is assigned. you can check it when you go in to the material line item, and then in condition tab, then click on the Analysis button and now you now your Pricing Procedure.

Now in Customizing go to the screen of "Define and Assign Pricing Procedure" (SIMG > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Pricing > Pricing Control > Define and Assign Pricing Procedures)

Here go to screen of Set Pricing Procedure (V/08), and now here search for your Pricing Procedure you'd in your document, select it and then go to folder of "Procedure - Control Data".

Here at its screen, now look for UTXJ, and you'll find the "Required" check box selected for this. unselect this here and save it.

Now you come back to your document (Quotation / Sales Order) and try to create it again, it'll be successfully created.

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Virtual - 2025
entry.content:
Ola, comunidade carioca! 

Nos dias 20 e 21 de Maio de 2025, a SAP disponibilizará o evento: SAP Sapphire Virtual para atender aqueles que não poderão acompanhar presencialmente nos USA. 

Me inscrevi em algumas sessões e volto para comentar sobre elas. Se você participará, deixa seu alô nos comentários e vamos interagir sobre o evento e as sessões. 🚀

entry.title: Re: Alphanumeric number ranges for Equipment in Plant Mai...
entry.content:
Hello,

@RaymondGiuseppi 

Please check below I had maintained (06 TH00000 to TH10000) intervals.

I need TH is to be prefix and 00000 to 10000 should be serially generates with respect to equipment creation.

I have not activated BADi.

entry.title: Subledger Source Document Type in Journal Entry Query
entry.content:
Hi All

How to get a corresponding mapping between these two Origin values in Journal Entry Query Statement and Subledger Journal Entry so we know which Origin Number in JE belongs to AP Invoice PU Origin?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: Automate tasks in FO in S/4 HANA Public cloud TM
entry.content:
Dear Sar,

We also have OData API's to update  "setting to ready for Transport execution ", manually add events like check in and check out etc.

Please refer the API link

https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_FREIGHTORDERTP

Thanks and regards,

Amita Gupta

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Wroclaw 2025 - update regarding registration of participants
entry.content: Its amazing! Congratulations!

entry.title: Re: How to open ObjectPage in edit mode in odata V4
entry.content: yes

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Trial - failed: Logon not possible (error in license check) only in Eclipse
entry.content:
If you can log in to SAP GUI, you have a valid license.

It seems that Eclipse is caching the error from somewhere. Please try to locate the corresponding file on your hard drive and let us know where it's stored.

Alternatively, you can try creating a new workspace in Eclipse and see if the issue persists there.

If none of this works, reinstalling Eclipse might help.

entry.title: Confirmation of production order through BAPI
entry.content:
I just wanted some information regarding the Bapi can you please suggest me what else I can do for the below Query:

During the production order confirmation using BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT, goods movement is successfully executed. However, in the event of an error, the record gets stuck in COGI, necessitating manual intervention for clearance. My primary concern is to ensure that errors are detected and surfaced before the Commit Work statement. Is there a way to prevent the BAPI from posting if an error occurs in goods movement, or what alternative solutions could be considered?"

entry.title: Re: Create One TO Per every line item in Delivery Items i...
entry.content: Thanks a lot -Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Become a Certified SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Project Manager
entry.content:
Hi @Dieter_Voll,
Thanks a lot for sharing this wonderful post.
It is indeed a detailed one, let me go through this and get back to you in case need arises.
Best Regards
Arun

entry.title: Re: Audit of Compensation plan template changes by proxy
entry.content:
Hi @vinkamath 

As far as I know there is no audit of Compensation admin tools available.

The only way I can think of to have more control is to grant specific people access to specific features (manage lookup table, guidelines, etc..) and only allow to proxy as CompAdmin to launch worksheets.

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Eliminate EC data freeze period during compensation p...
entry.content:
Hi @vinkamath 

So you'd like to understand how to set up a template in a way that any change reflected in EC updates on the worksheets ? 

As far as I know the only way is to set the template EC effective date to be in the future then schedule a mass update worksheets job overnight to capture changes in data and eligibility.

You may want to also look at this blog I wrote not too long ago : https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-sap/forcing-the-default-guideline-value-on-annualized-salary-change/ba-p/13921968

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Need UDF help to implement logic in message mapping t...
entry.content:
Hi Varun

solve this with XSLT and Muenchian grouping. That is very easy code (even complex to understand). If you like to have everything else in the graphical playground, it's possible to combine the two technologies.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: Issue When Deleting Promotions in Executive Review Af...
entry.content:
Hi @S0026396369 

I would create a support ticket for an issue like this. 

I will also forward your issue to our product team to see if they already heard about it.

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: How to delete FI document generated from Goods Receip...
entry.content:
Hello @Jacob_Do  it is not possible to delete FI document posted in system only reversal allowed which not applicable in your case as document posted through material document for reversal material document also needs to be reversed.

 

it is also not suggested to delete data technically at table level in production it can result in system inconsistency.

one approach you can follow take balance of all gl which are posted via these material documents & post a JV to make balance of these GL zero manually.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications: Token for Employee Title
entry.content:
Hi @MariaCarlotaAbreu 

Not sure if it's available, I think very few are for Compensation module routing notifications but I'll double check in KBAs and configuration guide when I get a chance.

What you'll most likely have to do is pull the value to the "Info" section of your statement template and then show it on the main text using the method used in this blog: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-sap/making-standard-compensation-statements-always-fit-on-one-page-by-using/ba-p/13469162

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: materialization is failing with error message interna...
entry.content: Dear Mathan, I'm afraid I cannot tell the cause exactly from the given error message. We have to dig into the HADR related logs to get a better understanding on the whole picture. Probably you can find more errors from the logs and paste here, which can give us more hints

entry.title: Re: Roles of SAC in IAG
entry.content:
We have been implementing a custom SAC connector, with the guidance of SAP Consulting, a few years ago.
At that time (2021-2022) provisioning of users was by teams only. I doubt that this has changed.

Cheers, Sigi

entry.title: Re: Partially compounded display keys in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Hi @Sajoscha, Thank you for your support! I will create a ticket!

entry.title: Re: EC Employee History field mapping
entry.content:
Hi @Isabella 

Is your Variable Pay template as a whole integrated to EC ? 

Is there an EC Effective Date entered in Plan Setup ?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_COMPENSATION/bf61437930374da6a5fa50802e41a366?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2505

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Clarifications Regarding Choosing SAP Modules for the future path
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner , Hi Everyone,

Good morning! I hope you're all having a great day.

I’ve been meaning to post this for a while. I’m completely new to SAP, with no prior experience except for some self-research. Though I’m starting a bit later (35+), I have an engineering background and some exposure to German in my professional life. I’m a fast learner and adaptable to new environments.

I’d really appreciate your guidance on the following:

  1. After completing the basic SAP S/4HANA module, I’d like to specialize. Could you please list the SAP modules in order of:

    • Market demand

    • Job prospects after certification

    • Earning potential

  2. Could you suggest a detailed and structured roadmap with 2–3 module options to consider? I’d also appreciate links to recommended learning resources.

  3. What additional modules would be valuable to learn in the future to stay relevant and future-proof in the SAP industry over the next 10–15 years?

I know these are big questions, but as a fresher, I’m eager to understand the market and make informed decisions. Your insights would mean a lot and help me kickstart my SAP journey with confidence.

Thanks in advance for your time and support!

Best regards,
AK

entry.title: my data action has no error , but it is not working
entry.content:
CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/Br_profit_center], [d/BR_Product], [d/BR_COMPONENT]
CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = CALENDARYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON
CONFIG.FLIPPING_SIGN_ACCORDING_ACCTYPE = OFF
MEMBERSET [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center], %profit_center%)  //MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %BUDGET_YR% TO NEXT(11, "MONTH", %BUDGET_YR%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/start_date] TO [d/Version].[p/end_date]
MEMBERSET [d/gl_account1] = ("CIF LKR", "CIF_LKR")
MEMBERSET [d/BR_brand] = "#"
//MEMBERSET [d/BR_COMPONENT] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_OFFICE] = "#"
 
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_customer] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_Dist_Channel] = "#"
//MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET[d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD"
 
 
 
IF [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center].[h/heirarchy], "0PHAH") THEN
//IF [d/BR_Product].[p/] = "Imported Product" THEN
        DELETE()
 
DATA([d/gl_account1] = "Buying Price", [d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD" ) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] = "FOB" ) * ( 1 + (RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] = "INSURANCE %")/100) + (RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] ="FREIGHT")/100))
 
 
DATA([d/BR_Product] = "3000000368") = 1000
 
ENDIF

entry.title: Re: Project Kernseife - improving the measurement of Clean Core in ABAP
entry.content:
Hello @LBretschneider,

thank you for the Repo and the thoughts you have put into this project, this will help customers. One point from my side. We use the ATC on the ABAP envrionment in BTP, so when we install the ATC check we could also install a RAP application to maintain the objects. So it would be nice, if you also provide a RAP application as we are not using CAP in the company.

Greetings

Björn

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Thomas,

 

Thank you for your comment. We were able to loosen the business requirement a bit that customers are OK to split Sales Order into 2 different Sales Order for the different UoM.

We try to overcome this by having two different Sales Org (One for UoM1, the Other for UoM2) two different Plants, and two different Intercompany Business Partners as well so that we can maintain Sales Pricing PPR0 (SO to customer) by different Sales Org, Intercompany Purchase Price PI01 by different "In Transit Plant", and Intercompany Sales Order Price PPR0 by different Business Partners.

 

Since this is S4HANA public cloud, we are not able to perform the configuration of In-Transit Plant ourselves. I wonder if the setup mentioned above is workable? i.e. One Selling Company can accommodate two in-transit plants.

Best Regards,

Weerakhan T.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Variable Pay Forecasting Report
entry.content:
Hi @rebeccanussba 

Direct type still wasn't supported when I last used it for a demo in early 2024.

Can you share the forecasting report you received from the system with direct type so I can compare it with examples I have from previous demos where I didn't have direct type ? The report should still run but the values in it should be blank or not reflect an actual forecast.

I also think you are right with question #1'sassumption that record changes are ignored but need to double check.

Regarding the other questions it would help if you could share a little more of the configuration of the Variable Pay template you are testing with, for example the formula, which sections are used, and an example of the business goals created.

To this day I still have a customer that uses the forecast feature on a regular basis unfortunately.

Thanks

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Weerakhan

as far as I can tell, your solution should be usable. You can have as many transit plants as you want in a sales organization.

Since I am working in private cloud this might need verification from colleagues in public cloud however.

regards Thomas

entry.title: PO exit to update FOC flag to all PO item
entry.content:
Hi.

There is a request to update FOC (Free) indicator to all PO items if meet the FOC criteria.

I have tried using BAdI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST (MEPOITEM-USMON = X), but it is not covering all scenarios:

method PROCESS_HEADER --> not triggered if no PO header change

method PROCESS_ITEM --> not triggered if no PO item change

method CHECK & POST --> it triggered for all steps but the update seems not working. If we display again the PO, the FOC indicator is blank (not updated)

I found exit EXIT_SAPMM06E* but mostly are for custom fields.  Other exits are more to validation.

Pls advise. Thanks

entry.title: How to display the field "Trademark" in the "Manage Product Master Data" app?
entry.content:
The "Product" information has a native field "MARA-BRAND_ID". How can I display and edit this field in the "Manage Product Master Data" app? The field is only 4 characters long—how can I save a longer trademark name? How do I add this field in the "Data Migration" - "Product" template?

##SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition##SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Master Dat

  •

entry.title: Re: Ariba: Invoice issue
entry.content:
when requisition is approved, a PO is sent to SAP to retrieve SAP PO number and line numbering there (10, 20, 30) which then goes back to Ariba Buying and from there to Network... so invoice should have also 10,20,30... 

are you creating POs in SAP when requisition is approved in Buying?

entry.title: Re: How to delete FI document generated from Goods Receip...
entry.content:
Thank you for your advice. However, using Journal Vouchers in this case would inflate the transaction volume on the Trial Balance during data migration (as we are migrating full transaction history from the customer's legacy system).

More importantly, G/L line items related to expense accounts have already been posted during the GR/SES steps.

entry.title: Re: Problem in BDC recording of Transaction Code - OVXC
entry.content: Please share resolution if you have found any

  • Speakers:

    • Paul Kurchina (SAP Enterprise Architecture Community Evangelist)
    • Helmut Grimm (Head of Global Enterprise Architecture & Advisory)
    • Gaurish Dessai (Principal Enterprise Architect, SAP)

Register now:  https://go4.events.sap.com/shift-eaa-bdc-webinar/en_us/home.html

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition 2505?
entry.content:
Thanks Markus, nice blog...

One question - do you know which API (odata) I can use to create a BP Change Request in the Cloud-Ready edition ? I'm using SAP Integration Suite.

Regards, Erik

entry.title: 入門！SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning 機能紹介シリーズ - バリュードライバーツリー
entry.content:
本ブログシリーズはSAP Analytics CloudのPlanning機能をこれから学ぶ方を対象とし、予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要なSAP Analytics Cloudのそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介します。

※機能の詳細ついてはSAP Help Portalを参照ください。

※ SAP Analytics Cloudは、四半期に１度のペースで製品のバージョンアップが実施されます。そのため今後のバージョンアップにより、本ブログで紹介する画面キャプチャや、操作が異なる可能性があることをご了承ください。（本ブログは2025年5月に作成しています。）

本ブログでは、SAP Analytics Cloudにおけるバリュードライバーツリーについてご紹介します。

目次：

  • バリュードライバーツリーの概要
    • バリュードライバーツリーとは
    • バリュードライバーツリーの構成
  • バリュードライバーツリーの使い方
  • バリュードライバーツリーの作成方法

 

バリュードライバーツリーの概要

バリュードライバーツリーとは

バリュードライバーツリーとは、経営指標や主要な評価項目など、関連するドライバーを構造化して表示させるものです。また、SAP Analytics Cloud for Planningではデータ入力が可能であるため、バリュードライバーツリーの表示だけでなくビジネスドライバーの値を変動させてのシミュレーションを行うことも可能です。

SAP Analytics Cloudにおいて、バリュードライバーツリーはチャートやテーブルと同様にストーリーに配置することができるアセットの一つであり、ダッシュボードやレポートに追加して状況の可視化や指標の関係性の理解、シミュレーションに使うことができます。バリュードライバーツリー上で値の変更を行うと、同じモデルを使用しているチャートやテーブルも値が連動します。

 

バリュードライバーツリーの構成

バリュードライバーツリーの各指標のボックスのことを「ノード」と呼び、ノードとノードの「リンク」でツリーが構成されます。バリュードライバーツリーの全体および各ノードにフィルタをかけることができます。

 

バリュードライバーツリーの使い方

例としてROICを先頭に各指標がノードで展開されているバリュードライバーツリーを使用します。売上原価率の向上がROICに与える影響をシミュレーションしたい場合、「売上原価率」の値を「+10%」などと変更すると、影響のある指標の値が変わり黄色でマークされます。バリュードライバーツリーを活用すると、どこにどれだけ影響があるのかを確認しながらシミュレーションすることができます。

また、表示されているノードが多く見えずらい場合は、ノードを右クリック＞「ノードの圧縮」で親ノードに圧縮することができます。反対に圧縮されているノードを展開することも可能です。

さらに、指標をディメンション（分析軸）ごとに細かく値を見たい／変更したい場合は、ノードを右クリック＞「ドリル情報」より展開したいディメンションをクリックすると、例えば下の画像では地域ごとの原材料費率にドリルダウンしたノードが追加されます。

 

 

バリュードライバーツリーの作成方法

バリュードライバーツリーを作成する方法は以下の2種類があります。

1. モデルから自動作成（モデルで階層や計算が定義されている場合）
2. 手動で作成

それぞれの作成方法を以下で説明します。

1. モデルから自動作成

1.1. ストーリーにバリュードライバーツリーをドラックアンドドロップし、データソースを選択します。

1.2. 「モデルからバリュードライバーツリーを自動生成...」を選択します。

1.3. 使用したい勘定を選択します。（関連する勘定が自動で選択されます。）

1.4. メジャーやフィルタを自由に設定したら完成です。

2. 手動で作成

2.1. ストーリーにバリュードライバーツリーをドラックアンドドロップし、データソースを選択します。

2.2. 「＋」より新しいノードを追加します。

2.3. 勘定／メジャー／フィルタの選択、ノードタイトルの変更をしてノードの設定を行います。（例：売上高）

2.4. 他のノードも同様に作成します。（例：粗利益、売上原価）

2.5. ノード間のリンクを行います。（例：粗利益のノードを選択し、「＋子を追加」から売上高と売上原価のノードを追加します。）

手動で作成する場合、上記の簡易的な勘定の関係性だけでなく、計算なども追加したノードを作成して自由にリンクすることによって、よりリッチなバリュードライバーツリーを作成することができます。自動で作成したバリュードライバーツリーにノードを新しく追加したり削除してカスタマイズすることも可能です。

 

今回はバリュードライバーツリーのご紹介でした。SAP Analytics Cloudは予算計画などの一連の予算管理業務に必要な機能を備えており、本ブログシリーズではそれぞれの機能の特徴や要点をご紹介しています。

こちらのリンクからご参照ください。

entry.title: 1H2025 Release: What is the purpose of the new Standard Element of Company
entry.content:
Am not sure I understand the purpose of the new Standard Element of Company, which was introduced as part of the 1H2025 Release: >> https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCTS/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/150cabde9edd4b62bae3a5e1faf29fb8.html?locale=en-US&version=cloud

We already have Legal Entity in Employee Central and this information is attached to every hire already.  What additional benefits will we gain by configuring Company as a Standard element in our EC config if all it's going to do is sync with the existing Legal Entity?  If we choose NOT to enable this new standard element, are we going to be missing out on any other related benefits?

Would be interested to understand how other customers are using this.

entry.title: Re: BPM app CALM "Host Name"
entry.content:
Hi Rayane,

Are you looking for the hostname of your SAP Cloud ALM tenant? 

As per your screenshot, you can find it in SAP Cloud ALM service key. If your tenant was provisioned before June 2023 then, you will have to download it from your SAP Cloud ALM subaccount via SAP BTP Cockpit. Otherwise, you can view/download from Landscape Management app in SAP CLoud ALM itself.

Please refer to this link for details and steps - https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/integration-monitoring/calm-connect.html

Hope this helps. In case if this doesn't solve your issue or the issue described is different then please do elaborate.

Regards

Shubhra

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2025 年第二季度更新介绍
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能（BI）、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。 

本文介绍 SAP 分析云 2025 年第二季度的季度发布 (QRC) 的新功能和增强功能列表。

在链接的视频中，SAP 产品专将向您展示 2025 年第二季度的部分重点功能。

 

 

面向计划和分析的人工智能

  • Joule中的分析洞察
  • 智能洞察

数据中心可用性

  • 新增数据中心: 巴西（Azure），澳大利亚（GCP），日本（GCP）

数据分析器

  • 将洞察固定到故事可视化对象（仅查看时）
  • 打开故事时支持链接维
  • 为SAP Business Warehouse (SAP BW) 额外支持报表至报表接口(RRI)

数据建模

  • 新模型导入作业中的数据合并（仅Cloud Foundry）
  • 建模：换算表的文件资源库存储（仅Cloud Foundry）
  • 建模：用户管理的单位换算（仅Cloud Foundry）

企业计划

  • 指南针:在新浏览器选项卡中启动模拟
  • 指南针: 突出显示无随机抽样的动因
  • 多步操作: PaPM 步骤
  • 多步操作: API步骤中的字符串和日期时间参数
  • 多步操作：在设置对话框中访问操作的使用位置
  • 计划流程管理：日历通知中的终端用户管理
  • 版本管理：通过引用PlanningModel对象扩展API脚本

Microsoft Office 集成   

  •  新标签页用于组织工作簿信息
  •  在Microsoft Excel中创建性能报告用于分析和跟踪
  •  在Microsoft Excel中改进样式支持
  •  Excel中保留自定义单元格高度和宽度的表格设置​
  •  为 Microsoft Excel（桌面版）提供 VBA 支持​
  •  Microsoft PowerPoint 插件支持文件夹文件导航​

故事设计

  •  支持SAP Datasphere实时连接的模型的会计时间维度
  •  地理地图：流图层
  •  折线类图表的数据标签位置更新​

故事可扩展性

  •  在故事中提供SAP内置字体​
  •  数值点图表差异标签的CSS类​
  •  扩展 setModel() API 以禁止图表的变量提示​
  •  支持在组合定义中自定义组合尺寸
  •  支持在组合定义中设置阈值
  •  组合模型及属性管理的用户体验升级​
  •  自定义微件：支持视口渲染和后台加载
  •  支持传输自定义微件

故事演示

  • 完整查看器中的预先加载和高速缓存（嵌入和查看模式）

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇 SAP中文库文章。   

如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的中文 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP 分析云即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: Re: Status change log in CJ20N for existing projects
entry.content: Thanks a lot for the hint and Link to the Z-Program. This was exactly what I was looking for. Although I was hoping it was a bit more recent 😉

entry.title: Re: Partner TDD Onboarding for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition – Guide for Common Issues

entry.title: Re: How to post a PO condition value to inventory, GR/IR...
entry.content:
Have you set the account key in the used pricing schema for your ZTF1 entry? 

The account key is used to find the right G/L account.

entry.title: How to Reset s-user id password
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Please reset S-user id password of SPHONE_NUMBER1

while i am trying to change this password we got password reset link for S-user id SPHONE_NUMBER2 both user id have same mail id.

Please suggest how to reset it

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Reset s-user id password
entry.content:
Dear customer,

To reset S-user individual password, could you pls kindly refer to KBA 1808560 and access the URL https://accounts.sap.com/ui/createForgottenPasswordMail?spId=55365985e4b07dc3abdfc16c&targetUrl=&sourceUrl=? 

If you are using the function 'Forgot My Password', then as mentioned in the KBA, if you have more than one S-user ID associated to your e-mail address (like the scenario here), please then enter the S-user number, not email address.

Hope the KBA and the above information helps.

Thanks and regards,
Joanna

entry.title: Re: Automate tasks in FO in S/4 HANA Public cloud TM
entry.content:
Hello Amita, Thnx for the reply. Two questions.

1) Aren't API used to exhange data between our s/4 hana public cloud system and an external third party system ? You mean the API can be used to perform actions within our own system wihtout any external system involved ? ALso how API will know when to set status to "ready for Transportation execution "

2) If I want to auto populate Procuring company code, Purchase org in FO/FB, is there an API for the same or can I create some Z table with shipping point and corresponding Comp code and purchase org to be updated in FO/FB using a BADI

rgds

sachin

entry.title: when posting using 543 movement then sys is considering the standard price not moving average price
entry.content: Created a refurbished with material"s valuation Type R( Valuation type R has price indicator V) and component"s valuation type B/D (Valuation type B/D has price indicator S). But when receiving the finished production using 543 movement then system is considering the standard price not moving average price.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a warehouse order even when...

entry.title: Need to use Custom field in key figure calculation but i can't due to it's type
entry.content:
Hey 

I have a custom Field that hold the PGI date (it's updated from ECC to C4C ). the field was characterized as text in the very beginning and now i can't change it to Date.

i need to calculate the SLA according to this field : PGI date - reported date 

the PGI date is not available for me 

how i can handle that issue ? i will be glad to have any ideas 

thanks in advance 

helen

entry.title: In Rewards and Recognition, how to hide the Award Value from the Nominator after award approval?
entry.content:
We have a requirement where nomination will be done by Manager, however, the award value should not be shown to Manager once the award is approved. 

When Manager goes to Award History, he is able to view the Award Value (Screenshot 1). 

We have explored the option of hiding the Award Amount from RBP, but that does not allow an Manager/Nominator to even initiate this award. Hence we are looking for suggestions/options to:

1. Hide the Award Value from the Awards History Screen for Manager/Nominator (Screenshot 1)

2. Hide the Award History screen from Reward and Recognition Excellence (Screenshot 2)

 
Any thoughts/recommendations are appreciated.

@AndresCarter @xavierlegarrec Looking for your expertise here!

Hello,

for HTTP 500 errors, I recommend creating a ticket against the CA-ML-AIC component: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core/sap-ai-core-service-guide/support-process

Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2025
entry.content:

Other people facing this issue:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/failed-to-get-service-instance-from-adt/qaq-p/14104261

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/btp-trail-abap-instance-unavailable/qaq-p/14105140

on top of this I have checked with 4 of my team members and all confirmed that BTP Trial ABAP Environment is indeed not working.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: SAP CHOTA TALKS Hyderabad 2025 Q2 - RECAP

It was a fantastic experience, and your thoughtful analysis captures the essence of the event beautifully. I particularly appreciated the way you highlighted the collaborative spirit and the valuable discussions on SAP technologies and innovation. A big thank you to MOURI Tech for organizing such a well-executed event. Looking forward to more such engaging sessions and continuing the learning journey!  Keep up the great work! 👏🏼

entry.title: Re: How to delete FI document generated from Goods Receip...
entry.content:
Hi Jacob, consider below points as well.

1. When material documents posted, then in legacy system somewhere there finance impact should be there may be in B/S or P/L GL.

2. No need to post one by one JV just post one JV summarizing GL balance.

3. Example let say material consumption in SAP posted & debited GL X in sap in FI document & stock GL Y credit in SAP.

Now in legacy system corresponding GL should be there let say A for expense & B for stock credit.

When you post manual JV you can nullify X with Y in SAP Finally when you upload legacy data to SAP GL corresponding to A & B should have that balance considered.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Recovery of credential from SAP INTEGRATION SUITE
entry.content:
Hello Community of Integration Developers,

Recently, I faced a challenge when my SSH keys were accidentally deleted from the IS tenant. Despite my efforts, I was unable to recover them myself and was only able to retrieve the keys from a colleague. This situation raised an important question: While we store credentials daily in Security Material, Key Store, and PGP Keys, where exactly are these stored? Are they saved on SAP’s proprietary servers?

If any of these credentials are accidentally deleted, what options do we have for recovery? Is there a backup or recovery mechanism provided by SAP for such scenarios?

I would appreciate any insights or best practices regarding credential recovery in SAP Integration Suite.

Thank you.

SAP Integration Suite SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Issue with Multiple Accounting Ledgers in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. As part of the initial scoping, we had to activate some mandatory scope items, which cannot be subsequently activated: 1GA - Group Ledger IFRS, 2VA - GL US GAAP, 5HG Asset Accounting - Additional Depreciation Area, 5KF - Asset Under Construction, Additional Depreciation Area, 5W2 - Group Valuation. 

At the moment, our client needs only 1GA. However, the other scope items are causing us to have 4 accounting ledgers in total (0L, 2L, 3L, 4G) in two currencies each, which creates inconvenience for the client, having to maintain data on all 4 ledgers.

Is there a way to deactivate all ledgers except the one for IFRS even though they have been included in the initial scoping and cannot be removed as scope items? And respectively, can this deactivation be in a way that they can be activated again in the future if needed?

I am not an accountant so I hope that my question is clear. Will appreciate your help.

Kind regards,

Stella

entry.title: Re: Allowance and Charges PO-flip Issue
entry.content: Hi Pream, is CIG mapping required(CIG doc type "InvoiceDetailRequest") to process allowances and charges during supplier invoice creation in S/4HANA?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2025
entry.content: Seems like the trial system is still not available. Is there some kind of status page or even official communication on it? To me the system now seems very unsuited for trainings with fixed time frames.

entry.title: Building Resilient Supply Chains Amid Tariff Pressure with SAP Supply and Demand Segmentation
entry.content:
As the landscape of global trade continues to evolve, the possibility of new tariffs is creating waves of concern across the world's supply chains. Whether driven by shifting geopolitical alliances, trade disputes, or protectionist policies, tariffs can dramatically alter the cost-to-serve, disrupt sourcing strategies, and challenge existing supplier relationships. Companies must stay agile and be prepared to adapt their supply networks and fulfilment strategies with speed and precision to protect margins, maintain service levels, and stay competitive.

To build a truly responsive supply chain, companies must ensure that trade-related strategies are consistently reflected across all key operational processes—from procurement and manufacturing to logistics, costing, and order fulfilment. Only by creating a unified framework can businesses detect, track, and act on exceptions such as tariff changes, sourcing constraints, or shifts in trade policy. At the heart of this framework lies SAP Supply and Demand Segmentation—a foundational capability that serves as the axle around which all these moving parts revolve.

What is SAP Supply and Demand Segmentation

SAP Supply and Demand Segmentation enables companies to plan and execute their supply chain processes considering market and product -specific attributes, without the need of creating lots of SKUs differentiated only by those characteristics. Segmentation based on key characteristics such as country of origin, destination, certifications, and product value, companies can design differentiated, tariff-aware strategies that guide planning, sourcing, and execution decisions with precision.

Segmentation value essentially encapsulates the blueprint of the product and business attributes and can be attached to all supply chain relevant objects or documents. For example, the supply segmentation value can hold the attributes like country of origin and other tariff related parameters along with relevant configuration or logistical characteristics. The demand segmentation value can hold the attributes like country of destination and similar characteristics. The segmentation rules match the demand and supply segmentation values ensuring compliance. These rules are respected throughout end-to-end order-to-cash and supply chain processes.

Integration of Supply and Demand Segmentation with end-to-end business processes

SAP Supply and Demand Segmentation plays a crucial role in optimizing supply chain operations by integrating seamlessly with various processes to mitigate the risks from tariff related turbulences.

Integrated Business Planning

Characteristics Based Planning with segmentation enables sourcing decisions based on country-of-origin constraints, ensuring compliance with trade regulations and tariff strategies. This approach supports optimal supplier selection, cost control, and supply continuity in volatile trade environments.

Procurement

Purchase orders are generated in alignment with supply and demand segments, ensuring that materials are procured from the most suitable suppliers. By considering tariff related parameters in the supplier segmentation, organizations can minimize exposure to high tariff costs.

Manufacturing

Segmentation aligns production planning and scheduling with both supply and demand segments, ensuring raw materials are available on time and schedules meet specific customer needs. By factoring in tariffs, companies can strategically plan production in regions with lower duties or favourable trade agreements—optimizing resource use, reducing lead times, and minimizing tariff costs while improving delivery performance.

Inventory Management and Warehousing

With Segmentation, inventory is optimized by aligning stock levels and warehouse placement with product attributes, demand patterns, and tariff exposure. This approach reduces holding and handling costs, improves efficiency, and enhances service by strategically positioning inventory near low-tariff end markets.

Quality Management

Segmentation enhances quality management by aligning quality checks with product attributes and market-specific regulations. This ensures compliance, reduces defects, and minimizes costs and risks—especially in high-tariff, high-regulation markets.

Sales Order Management

Segmentation in order management enables priority handling based on demand attributes and performs availability checks against segmented inventory and production plans. By factoring in tariffs, the system optimizes fulfilment routes and commitments—boosting service levels while minimizing tariff costs.

Product Costing

Product costing can be calculated at the valuation type level using segment values, allowing for more accurate, attribute-based cost insights. This enables better pricing, margin analysis, and tariff impact visibility across differentiated segments.

An example scenario

Let’s take practical example of how Supply and Demand Segmentation works.

A high-tech company manufactures and distributes electronic components globally. The company sources semiconductors, displays and other hardware from various countries, assembles and sells finished products to multiple international markets. Due to tariffs and trade regulations, it is crucial to segment both supply and demand based on the country of origin and the country of destination, along with other physical configuration or logistical parameters.

SAP Supply and demand segmentation helps the company plan sourcing based on tariff exposure, prioritize procurement from low-risk regions, align manufacturing schedules with regional demand needs, and calculate costs based on country-of-origin inputs. In this example, supplies with certain segmentation value can be sold to customers in Europe, but can't be sold to customers from Europe. Thus, segmentation ensures smarter production, lower landed costs, and optimized fulfilment tailored to each market's trade requirements.

Conclusion

In today’s volatile environment, resilience isn't optional; it’s a strategic imperative. Segmentation enables companies to navigate tariff complexities by aligning sourcing, production, and fulfilment strategies with specific trade attributes. This approach minimizes tariff costs, enhances supply chain efficiency, and ensures smarter decision-making, ultimately driving profitability and resilience in global operations.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2025
entry.content: @fabianlupa you are correct! It's still not up after the planned downtime Window.

entry.title: sapui5 sso oauth
entry.content:
I am currently working on implementing Single Sign-On (SSO) for my SAPUI5 application within the MCF (Multichannel Foundation) framework. I have configured OAuth 2.0 in the system using transaction OA2C_CONFIG, and I am utilizing the Authorization Code flow for authentication.

The flow works as expected when tested using Postman—I am able to successfully obtain an access token.

However, when I implement the same flow in my SAPUI5 application and attempt to access it using the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code obtained from the parent (mother) application, I am redirected to the SAP login page and prompted to enter credentials specific to my SAPUI5 application. This occurs even though the user is already authenticated in the parent system, albeit with a different username and password.

To address this, I developed an OData service that verifies whether the user exists and is active in SAP NetWeaver, using the user's ID. This ID is obtained by calling an API from the parent application, which provides information about the currently authenticated user.

My question is: How can I bypass the SAP login page in this scenario and enable my SAPUI5 application to automatically authenticate the user using the Authorization Code flow and session from the parent application?

entry.title: Re: FIWTIN_QRETURNS base amount TDS
entry.content: Hi Duezenli

entry.title: Re: Prevent use of Debug with /H
entry.content:
Dear Team 

the correct object name is S_DBG     ABAP Debugger         inactive this, then you restrict the /H for debugging.

Thanks

entry.title: Adoption of the EUR and new company code in EUR in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, everyone,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud at a large client in the manufacturing industry in Bulgaria.

Since Bulgaria's national currency is BGN, we have configured CBC in BGN as Local Currency and EUR as Group Currency. However, in relation to Bulgaria's adoption of the EURO most likely from 1 Jan 2026, we will now have to create a new company code in EUR once SAP releases the content for Bulgaria in EUR.

My questions are:

  • What is the fastest and most automated way to transfer the current configurations of the Development/Test/Production System into the new company code?
  • Has anyone used SAP's technical teams to make a system copy? If yes, how long did it take?

You can also share any other valuable lessons learned in relation to this topic.

Many thanks for your help,

Stella

entry.title: Re: (APIs) TransportationCode -1 not acquired
entry.content:
Hi dausto,

Refer to the following link for the solution:

Try to update ShippingMethod via DI-Api to -1 in order line 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: FIWTIN_QRETURNS base amount TDS

Please suggest if you have any inputs or share me the link that i can refer to.

I have an active BTP trial subscription still, so it is not related to that and also I did the updates through eclipse, but without any luck. Also, login via browser doesn't work as well.My guess is that the system is undergoing a regular maintenance.

entry.title: SAP Certification: One-Stop-Shop for Enteprise Architects and Transformation Consultants
entry.content:
Hello! I'm Mark Anderson, Business Transformation Management (BTM) Lead for SAP Partners in the SAP Industries & Experience team, otherwise known as SIX. Feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn.

When it comes to our BTM solutions, I've curated details in effort to simplify your SAP Certification journey. Feel free to comment below on what worked for you or ask a question to me and our SMEs. Let's get started!

  • If you haven't already, I strongly recommend reading and bookmarking this blog from some of my colleagues. It covers our certification model, partner requirements, and a robust FAQ section. There is one section specifically relevant:

By July 2025, all partner resources in key roles – enterprise architects, developers, business transformation management consultants, project managers involved in RISE with SAP projects – must have a valid SAP certification. By the end of 2025, it is expected that 50% of relevant partner practitioners will hold at least one valid certification in the SAP solution portfolio. Overall, this means that SAP partners will need to continuously update and expand their skills.

SAP offers nine different certifications for Enterprise Architects and Business Transformation Consultants. The chart below outlines each certification, it's corresponding Learning Journey, time estimates, and where to find details on "Stay Certified" content to ensure your certification remains active for years to come. 

 

Role

 Get  Certified*

Stay Certified **

Supporting Learning Journey***

Signavio

Process Management Consultant

Get Certified

C_SIGPM_2403

3 hrs Exam: 60 questions

Stay Certified

2 hrs

Assessment: 8-10 questions

Managing Business Processes with SAP Signavio Solutions

8 hrs

Process Data Analyst Consultant

Get Certified

C_SIGDA_2403

3 hrs Exam: 80 questions

Stay Certified

2 hrs

Assessment: 8-10 questions

Analyzing Business Processes with SAP Signavio Solutions

8 hrs

Business Transformation Consultant *NEW for 2025*

Get Certified

C_SIGBT_2409

3 hrs Exam: 80 questions

Coming Soon

 

Exploring Business and Solution Transformation Tools and Methodology

3  hrs

LeanIX

SAP LeanIX Consultant

Get Certified

C_LIXEA_2404

2 hrs Exam: 60 questions

Stay Certified

2 hrs

Assessment: 8-12 questions

Learning to Use the LeanIX Tool for Successful Enterprise Architecture

5 hrs

WalkMe

WalkME Digital Adoption Consultant

entry.title: Re: Force HU-LB for Planned Replenishment
entry.content:
Hi @joka89 ,

Could you please provide info so someone could help you to fix the issue.

What are the difficulties you face while moving from Full Pallet Reserve Location to Pick Face ? I mean how HU WT would solve instead of Product WT ?

Reserve Location: Only Full Pallet is stored or its a mixture of all kind of products with different packaging? Have used Quantity Classification to distinguish ? What is the storage type settings ?

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: How to delete FI document generated from Goods Receipt and Service Entry Sheet
entry.content: Hi Jacob Do

entry.title: Health Monitoring | threshold | Response Time | task type- Dialog
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As of today, I am able to receive the email alerts for the task type RFC and Batch only.

I do I enable the email alert for task type Dialog.

Which metrics to select and how, kindly share the details.

 

Thanks & Regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Health Monitoring | threshold | Response Time | task...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

please find a list of available Health Monitoring metrics for certain products here https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/health-monitoring/health-mon-content.html

ABAP Metric "Response Time" contain data for all task types, including also dialog.

There you can set a threshold for the metric. Also you can configure an event to trigger email notifications for alerts.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: No certification attempts (employee edition) assigned to my subscription
entry.content:
Hello, 

My SAP Learning Hub (employee edition) and system access is valid until 20 June 25, however my SAP Certification 4 attempts employee edition are in status EXPIRED and I am not able to book certification exams. How can I change this? 

Regards,
Sarah

entry.title: Re: Multiple Discount Conditions; Condition Ignored 002 not fulfilled
entry.content:
I have checked for Item category configuration in VOV7 where item category is relevant for Pricing marked as "X" & also checked the condition exclusion, everything is proper. But did not getting why requirement 002 not fulfilled. Can someone please suggest solution on this issue.

Regads 

Aniruddha

entry.title: Remove Material Type ERSA in Unplanned Maintenance Components
entry.content:
Hello community,

I have a question regarding the app "Perform Maintenance Job":

When a user adds an unplannend component the material type has the default value "ERSA". We are not using any ERSA materials and therefore no results appear. 

Is there an option to remove or change this default value? Please see also screenshot attached.

 

Thank you and BR
Mona

entry.title: Re: Project Kernseife - improving the measurement of Clean Core in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi @BjörnS !

Happy to share the content. We decided against an ABAP app for some reasons:

  • No direct integration possible: As our check relies on the standard check, we need to use functionality that is not released for ABAP Cloud. So a harmonized solution, where check and classification reside in one stack within BTP ABAP was not possible.
  • Side-by-Side: We needed to create the classification centrally, but several different landscapes (in different customer environments) needed to be considered. That is why we have a classic upload/download functionality, as it is the easiest way to spontaneously exchange data with different systems. In addition, we directly connect to e.g. the cloudification repository to check the current SAP release / nomination state.
  • There is no value add to choose ABAP then, as we would have needed an BTP ABAP environmnent internally just for this classification App. There, a simple CAP App was easier to achieve.
  • My colleague @DanielHuser was developing, he wanted to check in CAP.

Currently, this is not high on our list, so we will not "provide" this in the near future. But as it is open source, we would of course be happy to see someone creating a PR to add the RAP part! 🙂

entry.title: sign up for SAP Code Jam: Hands-on with the BTP CLI and APIs
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have great news for you!

In the global SAP community, there is a fine tradition for each edition of the SAP Inside Track conference to be preceded by a SAP Code Jam training session. This practice has also been preserved for the Wrocław event!

There will be SAP Code Jam: Hands-on with the BTP CLI and APIs led by the legendary DJ Adams!!!

 

When? June 7, 2025!

Where? 14G Fabryczna Street, Wroclaw, 2nd floor, room 220

About what?  Participants will learn about the ins and outs of the BTP CLI and APIs for SAP BTP, which are core services for SAP BTP. According to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, these services enable” managing, building and extending the core capabilities of SAP BTP”.

What can I do? SIGN UP HERE
